title: TransDigm Group, Inc. (TDG) CEO Kevin Stein on Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: TransDigm Group, Inc. (NYSE:TDG ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 9, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Jaimie Stemen - Manager, Financial Reporting Kevin Stein - President, CEO & Director Jorge Valladares - COO Michael Lisman - CFO Conference Call Participants David Strauss - Barclays Bank Kenneth Herbert - RBC Capital Markets Noah Poponak - Goldman Sachs Group Nicholas Zhang - Credit Suisse Michael Ciarmoli - Truist Securities Gautam Khanna - Cowen and Company Kristine Liwag - Morgan Stanley Robert Spingarn - Melius Research Peter Skibitski - Alembic Global Advisors Seth Seifman - JPMorgan Chase & Co. Peter Arment - Robert W. Baird & Co. Robert Stallard - Vertical Research Partners Operator Good day, and thank you for standing by.

title: TransDigm (TDG) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Sales Rise Y/Y
text: TransDigm's (TDG) Q3 adjusted earnings of $4.85 per share beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 21.9%. Net sales increase 14.8% from the year-ago quarter's figure.

title: TransDigm Group Misses Revenue, Suspends Guidance
text: Aerospace parts producer TransDigm Group beat earnings but missed revenue expectations for the second quarter and suspended its 2022 outlook. The post TransDigm Group Misses Revenue, Suspends Guidance appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: TransDigm Group Reports Fiscal 2022 Third Quarter Results and Declares a Special Cash Dividend of $18.50 Per Share
text: CLEVELAND , Aug. 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE: TDG), a leading global designer, producer and supplier of highly engineered aircraft components, today reported results for the third quarter ended July 2, 2022. The Company also announced that its Board of Directors has authorized and declared a special cash dividend of $18.50 on each outstanding share of common stock and cash dividend equivalent payments under options granted under its stock options plans.

title: What Transdigm Group (TDG) Estimates Say About Its Recent Performance
text: A closer look at Transdigm Group & Security Solutions' quarterly performance shows how the commercial business is supporting relative softness in defense.

title: Why TransDigm Shares Flew Higher in July
text: Airline demand for spare parts shows no sign of slowing.
